auth.subtitle: Guess the song of the day and compete with the rest

home.aboutDescription: ECOS is a music guessing game similar to Heardle, focused on Spanish and Latin music. Every day a new song is released and you have to guess it by listening to audio clips that unlock progressively.
home.howToPlaySteps: You have 6 attempts. In each attempt you'll hear more seconds of the song. Search for the correct title or artist. The sooner you guess, the more points you get. You can skip an attempt if you don't know it.
home.reportTitle: Report a bug or suggest improvements
home.reportDescription: Found a bug, something that doesn't work as expected, or have an idea to make ECOS better? Your feedback helps us a lot to improve the experience for everyone. Every report and every suggestion matters: they help us fix issues and prioritize the improvements you care about most. Don't hesitate to use it —we really appreciate it!
home.reportMessagePlaceholder: Describe the bug, error, or your suggestion…
home.reportEmailPlaceholder: So we can get back to you
home.reportSuccess: Thank you. We've received your message.
home.reportError: Could not send. Please try again.
home.guestBannerDescription: Sign in to compete on the leaderboard
home.guestNotice: You're playing as a guest — your score won't be saved to the leaderboard.
home.guestResultTitleWon: Great result! Save it to the leaderboard
home.guestResultDescription: Sign in so your score counts on the global leaderboard and you can compete with other players.
